title: CivMC Fair-Play Xaero's
description: Changes Xaero's fair-play mode to be compliant with CivMC rules.
body:
This mod changes fair-play mode in Xaero's to be compliant with CivMC's radar rules.

- Changes to fair-play mode:
	- No longer completely disables radar
	- Disables radar entity darkening based on height
	- Radar shows all entities regardless of Y level
	- Radar shows invisible and sneaking entities
